free_text: Impact of nucleon transfer channels on complete
fusion in the 6,7Li+58Ni reactions near the Coulomb
tandem accelerator at Florida State University
foil of isotopically enriched 58Ni mounted on a Ta
The gamma rays from the evaporation residues
were detected in two Compton-suppressed high-purity
germanium detectors of clover type placed at 90 deg
with respect to the beam direction.
The in-beam gamma transitions feeding the ground state
of specific evaporation residue were collected to
determine the production cross section of that residue.
